title: Market Research Analysts and Marketing Specialists
description: Research conditions in local, regional, national, or online markets. Gather information to determine potential sales of a product or service, or plan a marketing or advertising campaign. May gather information on competitors, prices, sales, and methods of marketing and distribution. May employ search marketing tactics, analyze web metrics, and develop recommendations to increase search engine ranking and visibility to target markets.

tasks.text: Prepare reports of findings, illustrating data graphically and translating complex findings into written text.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect and analyze data on customer demographics, preferences, needs, and buying habits to identify potential markets and factors affecting product demand.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct research on consumer opinions and marketing strategies, collaborating with marketing professionals, statisticians, pollsters, and other professionals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure and assess customer and employee satisfaction.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Devise and evaluate methods and procedures for collecting data, such as surveys, opinion polls, or questionnaires, or arrange to obtain existing data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Measure the effectiveness of marketing, advertising, and communications programs and strategies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Seek and provide information to help companies determine their position in the marketplace.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Forecast and track marketing and sales trends, analyzing collected data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Gather data on competitors and analyze their prices, sales, and method of marketing and distribution.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor industry statistics and follow trends in trade literature.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Attend staff conferences to provide management with information and proposals concerning the promotion, distribution, design, and pricing of company products or services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and implement procedures for identifying advertising needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
